confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_b83e6fcd-b19f-46dc-a6c1-bd09b410bf78 read back as received

acceptance_criteria: TaskStatus and lifecycle SQLite authority admit deferred as a persisted status.
There is a sanctioned CLI transition into deferred with required rationale/residual/unblock evidence.
Deferred tasks do not appear as runnable recommendations or active builder work, but remain visible as deferred/blocker posture.
Dependencies on deferred tasks explain the blocker and unblock condition instead of generic unmet dependency only.
Existing use of in_review is not abused for external deferral.
Task 403 can be migrated from in_review workaround to deferred without direct file or SQLite edits.
payload.problem: Task lifecycle status surfaces advertise deferred, but the persisted task state machine does not admit deferred. Builder had to move task 403 to in_review to stop recommender churn, which is semantically wrong because the task is externally blocked, not completed-awaiting-review.
payload.proposal: Add a sanctioned deferred lifecycle state and command path for tasks that are intentionally paused on external capability, credential, live input, or authority-locus availability. Ensure recommender, workboard, lifecycle status, evidence, chapter status, task read, task report/finish, and mutation evidence treat deferred distinctly from in_review, blocked, needs_continuation, and closed.

source_context.reason: normal builder loop repeatedly tripped on 403/404 because no true deferred state was available

payload.title: Add first-class deferred task lifecycle status
